description_long: This object consists of a group of five axes, each with a distinct handle and blade design, arranged side by side. The handles are primarily wooden, displaying a range of finishes from smooth, light-colored wood to darker, more textured grips, some with visible wrappings or carved details. The blades are forged from dark metal, with variations including single and double-edged designs, and one featuring a pointed hammer or pick opposite the blade. The heads are securely mounted to the handles, with some showing traditional wedged or pinned attachments. The overall appearance suggests these axes are functional tools, possibly for chopping wood or as utility implements, but their varied designs hint at both practical and decorative uses. The metal surfaces show signs of wear and patina, indicating use or intentional aging for authenticity. No visible brand markings or labels are present on any of the axes.
description: A set of five wooden-handled axes with dark metal blades, each featuring unique handle textures and blade shapes. The axes display a mix of practical and decorative design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five axes side by side, highlighting the variety in handle finishes and blade shapes.
description_view_1: Edge-on view of the axes, emphasizing the thickness of the handles and the profile of the blades, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view of the axes, displaying the backs of the blades and the reverse side of the handles, with some wrapping and textural details visible.
description_view_3: Opposite edge-on view, again showing the axes in profile, with the handle shapes and blade thicknesses more apparent.
attribute_handle_type: Handles are straight or slightly contoured, made of wood with some featuring leather wrappings or carved grip sections; cross-sections are mostly oval or round.
attribute_blade_design: Blades are single or double-edged, made of dark steel, with some featuring a pointed poll or hammer opposite the blade; edges are curved or straight, with no visible decorative engravings.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged or pinned mounting, with visible transitions between blade and handle.
